name: Patient Case 1
history: Recent divorce, financial struggles, adjustment to single life, co-parenting, multiple friendships deteriorated after the divorce, complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I can't maintain my relationships, I am not worthy of love.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will always be alone and unsupported.
coping_strategies: Avoiding social interactions to prevent further rejection.
situation: Experiencing the breakdown of friendships following the divorce.
auto_thought: I am losing everyone important to me.
behavior: Withdrawal from social activities and isolation.
